questionText: Você está em uma loja de departamentos e quer saber se um produto específico está disponível em outro tamanho. O que você diz ao atendente?
correctAnswer: Do you happen to carry this in a larger size?
options: Do you happen to carry this in a larger size?
Have you got this in bigger?
Is this available in large?
Can I get this bigger?

questionText: Você quer perguntar ao vendedor se o preço de um item pode ser negociado. Qual é a expressão mais natural e educada em inglês?
correctAnswer: Is there any room for negotiation on the price?
options: Is there any room for negotiation on the price?
Can you make the price less?
Do you give discounts?
Will you take less money for this?

questionText: Você está em uma livraria e quer pedir uma recomendação ao vendedor com base em um livro que você já leu e adorou. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I loved this author's writing style — could you recommend something along similar lines?
options: I loved this author's writing style — could you recommend something along similar lines?
I like this book, give me another one like it.
Do you have more books from this type?
What other book is similar to this one?

questionText: Você quer devolver um produto que comprou online e precisa explicar ao atendente do suporte que ele chegou danificado. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I'd like to arrange a return — the item arrived damaged.
options: I'd like to arrange a return — the item arrived damaged.
The product is broken, I want my money.
I need to send this back because it's not good.
This thing broke when it arrived, fix it.

questionText: Você está em uma loja de eletrônicos e quer saber qual produto oferece o melhor custo-benefício entre duas opções. O que você pergunta?
correctAnswer: Which of these would you say gives better value for money?
options: Which of these would you say gives better value for money?
What is cheaper and better?
Which one is the most good for the price?
What product is more worth it?

questionText: Você quer perguntar a um atendente se a loja aceita cartão de crédito internacional. Qual é a forma mais adequada de perguntar?
correctAnswer: Do you accept international credit cards?
options: Do you accept international credit cards?
Can I pay with my foreign card here?
Is foreign credit card OK to use?
You take international cards, yes?

questionText: Você quer perguntar em uma loja se um determinado produto está em promoção. Como você pergunta de forma natural?
correctAnswer: Is this item currently on sale?
options: Is this item currently on sale?
Is this product having a discount now?
Does this thing have a promotion?
Is this on a sale price today?

questionText: Você quer pedir ao atendente que embrulhe um presente que você acabou de comprar. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Could you gift-wrap this for me, please?
options: Could you gift-wrap this for me, please?
Can you put this in a gift paper?
Please wrap this like a gift for me.
I want this wrapped as a present.

questionText: Você está saindo de uma loja e o alarme antifurto dispara acidentalmente. O que você diz ao segurança de forma educada e natural?
correctAnswer: I'm sorry — I have a receipt right here; I did pay for everything.
options: I'm sorry — I have a receipt right here; I did pay for everything.
I payed everything, I have the paper here.
Don't worry, I bought all things here.
I have the note, I paid all the products.

questionText: Você comprou um item e percebeu que a loja cobrou o preço errado no caixa. Como você aborda o atendente educadamente?
correctAnswer: Excuse me, I think there may have been a mistake — I was charged the wrong price.
options: Excuse me, I think there may have been a mistake — I was charged the wrong price.
Hey, you charged me wrongly for this.
The price on my receipt is different, it's wrong.
You made a mistake on my payment.

questionText: Você quer saber se pode experimentar uma roupa antes de comprá-la. O que você pergunta?
correctAnswer: Is there a fitting room I could use to try this on?
options: Is there a fitting room I could use to try this on?
Where is the room to put the clothes on?
Can I test this clothing before buying?
Where can I try the clothes here?

questionText: Você está em uma farmácia e quer saber se um remédio específico está disponível sem receita médica. O que você pergunta?
correctAnswer: Is this medication available over the counter?
options: Is this medication available over the counter?
Can I buy this medicine without a doctor's paper?
Do I need a prescription to get this drug?
Is this medicine free to buy here?

questionText: Você quer perguntar ao vendedor de uma loja de móveis sobre o prazo de entrega de um sofá. Como você pergunta de forma natural?
correctAnswer: What's the lead time on delivery for this sofa?
options: What's the lead time on delivery for this sofa?
How many days to deliver this couch?
When will the sofa arrive if I buy it?
How long for the sofa to come to my house?

questionText: Você está em uma loja de vinhos e quer pedir ao sommelier uma recomendação de vinho para harmonizar com um prato específico. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I'm serving lamb tonight — could you suggest a wine that would pair well with it?
options: I'm serving lamb tonight — could you suggest a wine that would pair well with it?
What wine goes with lamb? I'm cooking it.
I need a wine for lamb, can you help?
Give me a wine that matches lamb for tonight.

questionText: Você quer pedir ao atendente que verifique se há mais estoque de um produto no depósito. Como você pede isso de forma natural?
correctAnswer: Could you check if you have any more of these out back?
options: Could you check if you have any more of these out back?
Can you look in the storage for more of this?
Please go check if there is more in the back.
Do you have more of this in the deposit?

questionText: Você quer reclamar formalmente ao gerente de uma loja sobre um produto defeituoso que comprou. O que você diz ao abordar o gerente?
correctAnswer: I'd like to speak to the manager regarding a faulty product I purchased here.
options: I'd like to speak to the manager regarding a faulty product I purchased here.
I want to talk to the boss about a broken thing I bought.
Can I speak with someone in charge? I bought something defective.
The manager needs to know about a bad product I got here.

questionText: Você quer perguntar se a loja oferece entrega no mesmo dia. Como você pergunta de forma adequada?
correctAnswer: Do you offer same-day delivery?
options: Do you offer same-day delivery?
Can you deliver to me today if I buy now?
Is it possible to get the delivery in the same day?
You deliver today if I order, right?

questionText: Você está em uma joalheria e quer saber se uma peça é feita de ouro puro ou de uma liga. Como você pergunta de forma precisa e natural?
correctAnswer: Is this piece solid gold, or is it gold-plated?
options: Is this piece solid gold, or is it gold-plated?
Is this made of real gold or fake gold?
This is pure gold or mixed with something?
Is the gold here original or a cover?

questionText: Você está negociando o preço de um carro usado com o vendedor e quer fazer uma contraproposta mais baixa. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I appreciate the offer, but I was thinking more along the lines of a lower figure — would you consider coming down a bit?
options: I appreciate the offer, but I was thinking more along the lines of a lower figure — would you consider coming down a bit?
That's too expensive. Can you put a smaller price?
I think the price is high. Can you reduce it?
Your price is not good for me. Lower it please.

questionText: Você quer questionar a política de devolução de uma loja de forma educada antes de efetuar uma compra. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Before I commit to this purchase, could you walk me through your returns policy?
options: Before I commit to this purchase, could you walk me through your returns policy?
What happens if I want to return this after buying?
Can I give this back if I don't like it later?
What is the rule for returning products here?

questionText: Você está em uma loja de artigos de luxo e o atendente está sendo excessivamente insistente. Como você recusa a ajuda dele de forma educada mas firme?
correctAnswer: I appreciate the assistance, but I'd prefer to browse at my own pace for now.
options: I appreciate the assistance, but I'd prefer to browse at my own pace for now.
Stop following me, I don't need your help.
I don't want help, please leave me alone.
I can shop by myself, no assistance needed.

questionText: Você quer expressar ao vendedor que está indeciso entre dois produtos e precisa de mais tempo para pensar. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I'm torn between the two — I think I need to mull it over before making a decision.
options: I'm torn between the two — I think I need to mull it over before making a decision.
I can't choose between them. I will think and come back.
Both are good. I need more time to decide.
I like both products. Let me think a bit more.

questionText: Você quer perguntar ao atendente de uma loja se o produto tem garantia e quais são os termos. Como você pergunta de forma sofisticada?
correctAnswer: Could you outline the warranty terms for this product?
options: Could you outline the warranty terms for this product?
Does this product have guarantee? What does it cover?
What is the warranty? How much time does it cover?
Tell me about the guarantee for this item please.

questionText: Você recebeu um produto errado em um pedido online e quer entrar em contato com o serviço de atendimento ao cliente para resolver o problema. O que você diz ao começar a conversa?
correctAnswer: I'm contacting you regarding an order discrepancy — I received the wrong item.
options: I'm contacting you regarding an order discrepancy — I received the wrong item.
I got the wrong product in my order, please help.
You sent me the wrong thing, I want the correct one.
My order is incorrect, I received something different.

questionText: Você quer perguntar em uma loja de informática se um notebook pode ser personalizado com mais memória RAM antes de ser entregue. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Is there an option to upgrade the RAM before it ships?
options: Is there an option to upgrade the RAM before it ships?
Can you add more memory to this laptop before I get it?
Can the RAM be increased prior to delivery?
Is it possible to put more RAM before sending the laptop?

questionText: Você quer saber se uma loja de roupas tem uma política de ajuste de preço caso o item entre em promoção logo após a compra. Como você pergunta?
correctAnswer: Do you have a price adjustment policy if the item goes on sale shortly after purchase?
options: Do you have a price adjustment policy if the item goes on sale shortly after purchase?
If this gets cheaper later, will you give me money back?
Can I get a refund if the price drops after I buy?
What happens if the price goes down after I buy this?

questionText: Você está comprando um presente para alguém e quer que o comprovante de compra seja enviado por e-mail, sem ser incluído na caixa. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Could you email me the receipt rather than including it in the package? It's a gift.
options: Could you email me the receipt rather than including it in the package? It's a gift.
Please send the receipt to my email and don't put it in the box.
Don't include the receipt inside the gift box, send it to my email.
Can the receipt go to my email because this is a gift for someone?

questionText: Você quer verificar com um vendedor se um produto específico está sujeito a alguma taxa alfandegária ao ser enviado para o Brasil. O que você pergunta?
correctAnswer: Would this item be subject to customs duties when shipped to Brazil?
options: Would this item be subject to customs duties when shipped to Brazil?
Will I pay extra taxes for this when it arrives in Brazil?
Is there a customs fee if I buy this and send to Brazil?
Does shipping to Brazil include extra government charges?

questionText: Você quer expressar ao atendente que um produto está além do seu orçamento atual, mas que está interessado em uma alternativa mais acessível. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: That's a bit out of my price range at the moment — do you have anything comparable but more affordable?
options: That's a bit out of my price range at the moment — do you have anything comparable but more affordable?
This is too expensive for me. Do you have something cheaper?
I can't afford this. Give me a similar product that is less.
This costs too much. Show me something with the same features but lower price.

questionText: Você quer questionar o vendedor sobre se o produto foi fabricado com materiais sustentáveis antes de comprá-lo. Como você formula a pergunta de maneira natural e sofisticada?
correctAnswer: I'm conscious about sustainability — could you tell me whether this is made from ethically sourced materials?
options: I'm conscious about sustainability — could you tell me whether this is made from ethically sourced materials?
Is this product made with green and eco materials?
Do you know if this is environmentally friendly?
Was this made in a sustainable way with good materials?

questionText: Você está em uma livraria especializada e quer encomendar um livro que não está no estoque. O que você diz ao atendente?
correctAnswer: I don't see this title on the shelves — would it be possible to place a special order?
options: I don't see this title on the shelves — would it be possible to place a special order?
This book is not here. Can you order it for me?
I need to buy a book that is not in the store. Can you get it?
Can you make a special purchase for a book that's not available?

questionText: Você quer expressar sua insatisfação com um serviço pós-venda de forma construtiva e profissional por escrito. Qual abertura de e-mail é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with the after-sales service I received following my recent purchase.
options: I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with the after-sales service I received following my recent purchase.
I want to complain about the bad service I got after buying your product.
Your service after I bought the product was really bad and I'm not happy.
I'm sending this email because the help I got after buying was terrible.

questionText: Você quer perguntar a um atendente se a loja tem algum programa de fidelidade e quais são os benefícios. Como você pergunta?
correctAnswer: Do you run a loyalty programme here, and if so, what does it entail?
options: Do you run a loyalty programme here, and if so, what does it entail?
Is there a card for regular customers with discounts?
Do you have a points programme? What advantages does it give?
What is your loyalty club and how do I join to get benefits?

questionText: Você quer pedir ao atendente que separe um item para você enquanto você vai buscar outra coisa na loja. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Could you hold this for me while I have a look around?
options: Could you hold this for me while I have a look around?
Please keep this product for me while I walk around.
Can you save this item while I go see other things?
Keep this for me, I'll come back to get it.

questionText: Você quer perguntar discretamente a um vendedor em uma loja de antiguidades se o preço de um objeto raro tem margem para desconto. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I'm quite taken with this piece — is the price at all flexible?
options: I'm quite taken with this piece — is the price at all flexible?
I like this antique a lot. Can you reduce the price a little?
This item is nice. Is there a possibility of a discount?
I want to buy this rare object. Will you make it cheaper for me?

questionText: Você quer questionar um fornecedor sobre os prazos e condições de pagamento para uma encomenda em grandes volumes. Qual é a expressão mais apropriada em um contexto B2B?
correctAnswer: Could you furnish us with details regarding payment terms and lead times for a bulk order?
options: Could you furnish us with details regarding payment terms and lead times for a bulk order?
Can you tell me about the payment and delivery time for a big order?
What are the conditions and time to pay and receive a large purchase?
Please inform me about how to pay and when to receive if I buy a lot.

questionText: Você está escrevendo uma avaliação detalhada de um produto em inglês e quer expressar que o produto superou as suas expectativas de forma elogiosa e sofisticada. Qual expressão é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: This product has far exceeded my initial expectations — it is a cut above what I had anticipated.
options: This product has far exceeded my initial expectations — it is a cut above what I had anticipated.
This product is much better than I thought it would be when I bought it.
The product was very good and I'm surprised because I didn't expect it to be so great.
I am very happy with this product because it was better than what I expected before buying.

questionText: Você está em uma negociação comercial e quer propor um desconto escalonado baseado no volume de compras. Como você apresenta a proposta?
correctAnswer: We'd be open to offering a tiered discount structure contingent on the volume of units ordered.
options: We'd be open to offering a tiered discount structure contingent on the volume of units ordered.
We can give more discount if you buy more products from us.
If you order many items, we can give different levels of price reduction.
Our discounts go up according to how many units you decide to buy from us.

questionText: Você quer contestar uma cobrança indevida no seu cartão de crédito referente a uma assinatura que você já havia cancelado. Qual é a forma mais formal e precisa de expressar isso em inglês?
correctAnswer: I'd like to dispute a charge on my account — a subscription I previously cancelled has apparently been billed in error.
options: I'd like to dispute a charge on my account — a subscription I previously cancelled has apparently been billed in error.
You charged me for a subscription I already cancelled, please remove it.
There's a wrong charge on my card for a service that I stopped subscribing to.
I want to complain about a payment on my account for a subscription that was cancelled.

questionText: Você é comprador de uma empresa e quer solicitar a um fornecedor uma proposta formal para um contrato de fornecimento de longo prazo. Como você faz essa solicitação?
correctAnswer: We would appreciate receiving a formal quotation for a long-term supply agreement at your earliest convenience.
options: We would appreciate receiving a formal quotation for a long-term supply agreement at your earliest convenience.
Please send us a price proposal for a long contract as soon as you can.
We want a formal offer from you for a continuing supply relationship.
Can you give us a quote for a long supply deal when you have time?

questionText: Você está lendo os termos e condições de uma compra online e identifica uma cláusula ambígua sobre reembolsos. Como você questiona isso ao suporte da empresa de forma precisa?
correctAnswer: I'd like clarification on clause 4.2 of your terms — it seems to be ambiguous regarding eligibility for refunds.
options: I'd like clarification on clause 4.2 of your terms — it seems to be ambiguous regarding eligibility for refunds.
The part about refunds in your rules is confusing. Can you explain what it means?
Section 4.2 of your terms is not clear. I don't understand if I can get a refund.
Please explain the refund rules in your conditions because they are not easy to understand.

questionText: Você quer expressar a um fornecedor que a qualidade do último lote de produtos entregues ficou aquém do padrão contratual acordado. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: The most recent consignment fell significantly short of the quality benchmarks stipulated in our agreement.
options: The most recent consignment fell significantly short of the quality benchmarks stipulated in our agreement.
The last delivery of products was not as good as the quality we agreed on in the contract.
The products in the last batch did not meet the quality standards we have in our contract.
What you delivered last time was below the quality level we formally agreed upon.

questionText: Você quer escrever uma avaliação negativa de um produto de forma construtiva e juridicamente segura, sem fazer afirmações que não possa comprovar. Qual opção é mais adequada para iniciar a crítica?
correctAnswer: Based on my personal experience, I found the product to be considerably below the standard implied by the manufacturer's claims.
options: Based on my personal experience, I found the product to be considerably below the standard implied by the manufacturer's claims.
This product is a total lie and the manufacturer is not being honest about what it does.
The product did not work as it was advertised, so the company is lying to customers.
I can say that this product is fraudulent based on what the company says about it.

questionText: Você quer negociar uma exclusividade de distribuição com um fornecedor internacional para o mercado brasileiro. Como você introduz o assunto em uma reunião de negócios?
correctAnswer: We'd like to explore the possibility of entering into an exclusive distribution arrangement for the Brazilian market.
options: We'd like to explore the possibility of entering into an exclusive distribution arrangement for the Brazilian market.
We want to be the only company selling your products in Brazil, can we discuss that?
Is it possible for us to have exclusive rights to sell your goods in the Brazilian market?
We are interested in having exclusivity to distribute your products only in Brazil.

questionText: Você quer invocar a proteção do consumidor ao perceber que uma empresa está usando táticas de venda enganosas. Qual é a forma mais precisa e eficaz de comunicar isso?
correctAnswer: I believe these sales practices constitute a breach of consumer protection regulations and I intend to escalate this accordingly.
options: I believe these sales practices constitute a breach of consumer protection regulations and I intend to escalate this accordingly.
What you are doing to sell things is illegal under consumer law and I will complain to authorities.
Your sales tactics are breaking consumer protection laws and I will report you.
I think your company is doing something wrong against consumer rules and I want to take action.

questionText: Você quer solicitar a um fornecedor uma amostra gratuita de um produto antes de fechar um pedido de grande volume. Como você faz isso de forma profissional?
correctAnswer: Prior to committing to a full order, we'd like to request complimentary samples to assess product suitability.
options: Prior to committing to a full order, we'd like to request complimentary samples to assess product suitability.
Before we buy a lot, can you send us some free products to see if they are good?
We want free samples first to test if the product is right for our needs.
Could we receive some trial products at no cost before placing a large order?

questionText: Durante uma negociação comercial, você quer indicar que chegou ao limite da sua concessão de preço e que não pode ceder mais. Qual é a expressão mais precisa e profissional?
correctAnswer: I'm afraid that's our best and final offer — we simply don't have any further latitude on price.
options: I'm afraid that's our best and final offer — we simply don't have any further latitude on price.
That is the lowest price we can do. We cannot go lower than this.
We cannot reduce the price anymore. This is the minimum we can offer.
This is our last price and we will not change it anymore in these negotiations.

questionText: Você quer expressar em uma negociação que aceita os termos propostos, desde que certas condições adicionais sejam atendidas. Qual expressão é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: We're prepared to accept the proposed terms, provided that the delivery timeline and payment clauses are amended accordingly.
options: We're prepared to accept the proposed terms, provided that the delivery timeline and payment clauses are amended accordingly.
We accept everything but only if you change the delivery and payment parts of the deal.
We are OK with the terms if you modify the parts about when we pay and when we receive.
We can agree to the terms you proposed if the payment and delivery conditions are modified.

questionText: Você quer questionar de forma elegante e direta se o vendedor de um item de luxo consegue autenticar a procedência do produto. Como você pergunta?
correctAnswer: Could you provide documentation attesting to the provenance of this piece?
options: Could you provide documentation attesting to the provenance of this piece?
Do you have papers showing where this luxury item originally came from?
Can you prove that this product is real and where it came from?
Is there any certificate or document about the origin and authenticity of this?

questionText: Você quer sinalizar ao vendedor, de forma sofisticada, que está disposto a comprar imediatamente se ele conseguir oferecer condições especiais. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: Should you be in a position to extend preferential terms, we'd be in a position to finalise the transaction today.
options: Should you be in a position to extend preferential terms, we'd be in a position to finalise the transaction today.
If you give me a special discount, I can buy it right now today.
I will buy immediately if you can offer better conditions for this purchase.
Give me a good deal and I'll close this purchase without delay.
